meaning: n.俾格米人(属一种矮小人种,身长不足5英尺),矮人,侏儒,小妖精adj.微小的,矮人的
examples: Reaching a maximum height of 56cm the pygmy goat is essentially a pet.
He's a pygmy when compared with great musicians.
Now it is an intellectual pygmy.
Yet there were no studies of fossils showing how the pygmy whale had evolved, Marx said.
There was one man, a pygmy hunter named Dawi, who could tell him the answer.
